TRANSLATION.TEXT: Dispatch, 10-23, I will make contact with the person
Dispatch, we're at the residence. Possible suspect located.
Dispatch, nobody is home or i'm at the wrong adress.
Suspect had heard your sirens and is fleeing their home.
10-24, sending additional units to the other locations.
Dispatch, 10-23, No match, 10-19 returning to patrol.
